title: DENTAL - 211info
text: BENTON HEALTH CENTER DENTAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for overall health and prevention such as cleanings, x-rays, fillings, extractions, periodontics, and dental health education. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-0123 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-0123 Emergency (800) 757-6844 After-hours Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance. Sliding fee scale available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding fee scale. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The Community Health Center is located in the Benton County Health Services building. Services: Dental Care Expense Assistance Dental Hygiene Dental Restoration Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mobile Dental Care Oral Health Education/Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON HEALTH CENTER
